regulations.description: Manganese extraction is limited to sites no deeper than 5000m
Manganese extraction must use ROV-type vessels for precision deep-sea operations
Manganese extraction requires minimum 25% concentration for commercial viability
Cobalt extraction is limited to sites no deeper than 4000m
Cobalt extraction requires minimum 10% concentration for commercial viability
Nickel extraction at depths over 4000m requires submersible-type vessels
Nickel extraction requires minimum 8% concentration for commercial viability
